definition: A form that allows a computational system to store manipulate search compare transform validate or reason over something.
Representation through tokens names expressions rules or symbols.
Representation through tables rows columns keys and constraints.
Representation through ordered arrays lists strings queues or streams.
Representation through trees nested structures taxonomies or parse structures.
Representation through nodes edges weights and relationships.
A learned vector representation used for similarity or contextual structure.
Data about origin meaning transformation use and governance.
Distortion omission flattening false precision or poor operation fit introduced by representation choice.
